rationale: Both candidates correctly validate the core AutoWeightsLoader mapper design and both flag the unswept hunyuan_image3_transformer.py caller of the removed get_cache_scale API, hitting the latent gap. Y's version is stronger: it verifies against the PR-time tree with grep evidence, labels it a clear blocker with concrete remediation options, and its other findings (dead None-check branches, missing test coverage) are all specific and grounded. X covers the same ground but frames the gap as a softened non-blocking note and includes a likely-fabricated detail (claiming the file now has a '(see #4810)' comment, which is internally inconsistent since #4810 is this very PR and doesn't touch that file), hurting precision.
